AvsStorageContainerProperties.description: The properties of an AVS Storage Container resource.

space.description: Contains properties related to used Flash space

provisionedLimit.description: Maximum amount of bytes that can be provisioned in this storage container. It must be a multiple of 512. Each time a volume is provisioned in this container, its provisionedSize will be counted against the provisionLimit and the provisioning will fail if it goes over (minimum: 1048576 (1Mi), maximum: 4503599627370496 (4Pi)). By default it is unrestricted.

provisionedLimit.description: Maximum amount of bytes that can be provisioned in this storage container. It must be a multiple of 512. Each time a volume is provisioned in this container, its provisionedSize will be counted against the provisionLimit and the provisioning will fail if it goes over (minimum: 1048576 (1Mi), maximum: 4503599627370496 (4Pi)). By default it is unrestricted.

AzureVmwareService.description: Azure VmWare Service properties. VASA is vSphere Storage APIs for Storage Awareness.

avsEnabled.description: if true, VASA support is enabled and the AVS configuration parameters below may be passed to change the current password. if false, VASA support will be disabled (but previous password configuration is not lost).

sddcResourceId.description: Resource id pointing at the AVS SDDC the pool is configured with.

vSpherePluginKey.description: Immutable identifier for the vSpherePlugin provided by Pure Storage. The value is available if the vSpherePlugin has been enabled for the storage pool.

current.description: The number of bytes written and read per second. Max over 10 mins.

max.description: Bandwidth rating of the highest available SKU in bytes per second.

SoftDeletion.description: Shows if Resource is destroyed and when eradication will happen.

eradicationTimestamp.description: Timestamp when Resource will be eradicated. Present only if `destroyed` is true.

previousResourceId.description: Set to the previous volumeResourceId for this volume if destroyed is true, and this used to be a VolumeGroup/Volume, the former Azure resourceId for that VolumeGroup/Volume before it was delete.

SoftDeletionUpdate.description: Shows if Resource is destroyed and when eradication will happen.

Space.description: Contains properties related to used Flash space

totalUsed.description: The total space used by customer data. Measured in bytes

unique.description: The unique physical space occupied by customer data. Unique physical space does not include shared space or snapshots. Measured in bytes.

snapshots.description: The physical space occupied by data unique to one or more snapshots. Measured in bytes.

shared.description: The physical space occupied by duplicated data, meaning that the space is shared with other volumes and snapshots as a result of data deduplication. Measured in bytes.
